source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
<image>Caption:
Summer GrIS surface  energy balance response to the  sea ice forcing.  a $\mathrm{SHF{+}L H F}$  [W  $\mathbf{m}^{-2}]$ ],  b   $S W_{i n}\left[W\thinspace m^{-2}\right]$ ],  c ${\mathrm{SW}}_{n e t}$   $[\mathbf{W}\mathbf{\thinspace m}^{-2}]$ ], and  d  albedo  $[-]$ .  Patched areas enclosed by grey  contours indicate non-signif- icant response at $95\;\%$  level,  according to a student’s t-test.  Only values corresponding to  the glaciated part of the grid  cell are shown
Question:
Which variable is depicted in panel (b)?
